resume.summary: Driven and personable B.Tech student with strong communication and relationship-building skills. Experienced in lead generation, client outreach, and closing conversations through a consultative approach. Seeking a Sales Internship to contribute to revenue growth and client success.

education.school: Indira School of Business Studies, Pune
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Sales Management, Marketing Principles, Consumer Behaviour, Business Communication, Negotiation Skills

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Lead Generation, Cold Outreach, Negotiation, Client Relationship Management
CRM (HubSpot/Salesforce basics), LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Excel
Pitch Deck Creation, Market Research, Objection Handling

experience.title: Sales Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Generated 150+ qualified leads through cold outreach, contributing to 12 closed deals.
Conducted product demos for prospective clients, achieving a 35% demo-to-trial conversion rate.
Maintained CRM records and follow-up cadences, improving pipeline visibility for the sales team.
Led a student sales drive for an edtech product, achieving 200+ sign-ups in one semester.
Built a referral incentive structure that increased conversions by 40%.
Designed and executed a simulated outbound campaign targeting 100 small businesses.
Achieved a 22% response rate through personalised messaging sequences.
Pitched a campus discount partnership to 25 local businesses, onboarding 9 partners.
Negotiated terms and tracked partnership performance over one semester.

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
